name: @pryzm/keyboard-registry
description: A.33.a (Phase A · Sprint 2) — L2 pure keyboard-shortcut registry per C43 §1.3.  Every editor tool MUST register its keyboard surface here; CI validates that no tool ships without one.  Pure: no DOM, no platform sniff at file scope (platform is passed as a parameter to `formatKeyCombo`).  The L5 cheat-sheet modal in `apps/editor` consumes `buildCheatSheetData()` to render the `?` overlay.
